nasb.text: The king said to Barzillai, “You cross over with me and I will sustain you in Jerusalem with me.”

esv.text: And the king said to Barzillai, “Come over with me, and I will provide for you with me in Jerusalem.”

cnv.text: 王對巴西萊說：“你與我一同過河去，在耶路撒冷與我同住，我要供養你。”

ccb.text: 王对巴西莱说：“你跟我一同回耶路撒冷，我会照顾你。”
